name: Refrigerator
description: Client is a single mother caring for her 9-year-old daughter and is currently dependent on ComCare assistance to meet the family's basic needs. Following an incident involving her ex-partner, essential kitchen fixtures were damaged and are no longer usable. As client has limited financial means and is prioritising her daughter's daily needs and household expenses, she is unable to replace these items independently. The loss of these kitchen facilities has affected the family's ability to prepare meals safely and conveniently at home. Donations of a refrigerator, would help restore a safe and functional living environment while alleviating the family's financial strain during this challenging period.
